overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Red Dead Redemption 2 showing a character walking through a rainy night in a historic city (Saint Denis). The character traverses wet cobblestone streets with tram tracks, passes a large gothic church, and walks along sidewalks lined with historic buildings and shops.

scene_state.functional_zone: historic city street with tram tracks

events.description: character transitions from standing still to walking forward down the street

agents.ego_description: character begins walking down a wet cobblestone street between historic buildings

entered.detail: multi-story brick building with arched windows and balconies
wooden facade building with covered porch and columns
metal tram rails embedded in the cobblestone street
cast iron street lamp emitting warm yellow light

segments.scene_description: The segment opens with a third-person view of a character standing in a rainy historic city street. The camera rotates around the character before they begin walking forward along wet cobblestones between tall historic buildings. Tram tracks run down the center of the street, and gas lamps provide the primary illumination in the heavy rain.

events.description: street opens up revealing a large gothic church ahead on the left

agents.ego_description: walking steadily down the street toward the illuminated church building

entered.detail: large stone cathedral with tall spires and arched entrance, illuminated from within
faint glowing signs visible in the distance down the street

segments.scene_description: The character continues walking down the wet street as the environment opens up to reveal a massive gothic church ahead on the left. The street widens slightly, and distant neon signs become visible through the rain. The character approaches the church while maintaining a steady pace along the tram tracks.

events.description: passing the church, entering more densely built commercial area with shops

agents.ego_description: walking past the church and continuing along the street toward commercial buildings

entered.detail: wooden covered walkway extending over the sidewalk
row of connected shop buildings with large windows and signage

segments.scene_description: The character passes the large gothic church on the left and enters a more commercial district. The buildings on the right transition to shop fronts with awnings extending over the sidewalk. The street remains wet and rain continues to fall as the character moves deeper into the commercial area.

events.description: character moves from open street onto covered sidewalk under awnings
character briefly slows while navigating past pedestrians on the narrow sidewalk

agents.ego_description: walking along the covered sidewalk past shop fronts and pedestrians

notable_agents.action: pedestrian in white coat standing near shop entrance

entered.detail: shop front with red painted wood trim and glass windows displaying items
building facade with green tiles and circular window
lit shop windows showing merchandise and Chinese character signage

segments.scene_description: The character moves onto a covered sidewalk beneath wooden awnings, sheltering partially from the rain. They walk past various shop fronts including one with a distinctive red facade and another with green tiles. The sidewalk is narrower and the character passes by pedestrians, including one standing near a shop entrance. Neon signs and lit windows illuminate the scene from the shops.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a rainy historic city that transitions from wide, lamp-lit streets to a sheltered commercial district. It begins with the camera rotating around a character before they move forward along wet cobblestones and tram tracks, flanked by tall buildings under the glow of gas lamps. As the character advances, the environment opens up to reveal a massive gothic church on the left and distant neon signs shimmering through the heavy rain. The scene then shifts as the character passes the church and enters a commercial area where the architecture transitions into shop fronts with extending awnings. Finally, the camera follows the character onto a covered sidewalk, moving past colorful red and green facades and pedestrians beneath the warm light of shop windows and neon signs.
